note: LATEST BLOCKS now shows 'base → eff' in the DIFFICULTY column when the V9 staged-relief cascade is easing a block's profile (e.g. H9 → E3 means cASERT raw base was H9 but the relief dropped the effective profile to E3). When the two match (no relief / pre-fork), only the single profile is shown. Doc-rot fix in src/pow/casert.cpp comments (570s/30s -> 540s/60s, matching the constants in params.h). Node logs now emit a [DATASET] line alongside [PRECOMP] so the 8 GB ConvergenceX footprint (4 GB dataset + 4 GB scratchpad) is visible in the operator log. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
